channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: Eureka Modern Mundane Mystery Jam Hosted by Agency of Narrative Intrigue and Mystery 17 Joined Overview Submissions open from 2026-06-01 13:00:00 to 2026-07-01 04:59:03 Starts in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam Eureka: Investigative Urban Fantasy is an innovative
